form.formComment: Going well. Last start by 1.1 m after showing early speed, (Fr5) at Albion Park (1:58.70) beating Amillionchances in 3yo+ NR 40 to 45 on March 27 at $3.10. The ace draw can see him continue the strong form.

form.formComment: Last start game effort when 3rd (Sr1) over 1780m at this track, beaten 4.5 m by Beer Money (2:10.50) in 3yo+ NR 47 to 54 on April 8 at $10. Two runs back won by a neck as favourite (Sr3) at this track (2:10.70) beating Connies Spirit in 3yo+ NR 41 to 46 on March 25 at $2.10. Draws for another good showing.

form.formComment: Solid run when a close second after being driven well back, behind Oakley Shard at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR 49 to 55 on March 31 at $41. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.25 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Warrawee Flyer at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR 43 to 50 on April 7 at $6. Strong claims.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr7) over 1730m at Bathurst was 7th-12.42 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Wishas Darling (2:04.00) in NR up to 60 on March 18 at $51. Two runs back 3rd (Sr2) over 2040m at Parkes, beaten 15 m by Starlight Sass (2:31.80) in NR up to 55 on February 27 at $9.50. May need some luck to figure.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr6) over 1730m at Bathurst, at the bell was 7th-13.45 beaten 9 m by Beyond Doubt (2:06.10) in NR up to 60 on March 18 at $16. Two runs back posted a big 4 m win when driven back in the field, (Fr7) held up early, at Bathurst (2:05.00) beating Kenzie Shannon in NR up to 50 on March 11 at $6.50 at the bell was 6th-9.83. Others read better. Draws wide so prefer to see in Queensland.

Broke gait clear of interference passing the 300m.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr4) over 2138m after racing wide at Albion Park beaten 11 m by The Rizzler (2:33.30) in 3yo+ NR 51 to 60 on April 7 at $5.50. At the start before good run when 3rd (Fr2) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten a head by Oakley Shard (1:55.90) in 3yo+ NR 49 to 55 on March 31 at $5.50. With even luck he can be about the money.
